parameters.query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.type, e.status, e.testing_window_start, e.testing_window_end,
       c.name as client_name,
       em.total_assets, em.assets_tested, em.coverage_pct,
       em.total_findings, em.validated_findings, em.verified_fixed, em.avg_mttr_days,
       em.criticals, em.highs, em.mediums, em.lows,
       (NOW() BETWEEN e.testing_window_start AND e.testing_window_end) as is_in_window
FROM engagements e
JOIN clients c ON e.client_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN engagement_metrics em ON em.engagement_id = e.id
WHERE e.status IN ('active','completed')
ORDER BY e.created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE validation_status='pending_analyst') as global_pending_validation,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE priority_bucket='immediate_attention' AND remediation_status='open') as global_immediate,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM retest_records WHERE result IS NULL AND scheduled_at < NOW()) as global_overdue_retests,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE is_recurring=true) as global_recurring,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM engagements WHERE status='active') as active_engagements,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients) as total_clients,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE first_seen >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') as new_findings_7d,
  (SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - first_seen))/86400),1) FROM normalized_findings WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL) as global_avg_mttr;

SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count, AVG(recon_score) as avg_score
FROM normalized_findings
WHERE validation_status IN ('validated','analyst_reviewed')
  AND remediation_status NOT IN ('verified_fixed')
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 8;

meta.description: RECON OS WF-18: Engagement Dashboard — GET /webhook/recon-os/dashboard returns real-time JSON with global health, all engagements, coverage, findings by severity, MTTR, and weakness heatmap.
